case_title: TENDERLOIN HEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. ROBERT STALLARD et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT STALLARD, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT STALLARD, ROBERT
